data.body:
💎Foreclosure Task Force Ch. 2 Update Celebration Gift💎

Here's a gift celebrating the new main story "Foreclosure Task Force Ch. 2" update!

You can view your 1,200 Pyroxene celebratory gift in your mailbox!
(Can be claimed until 11/23/2021 14:59 PM (UTC))
